content.full_text:
August 8, 2001

Richard R. Rudnansky
Meyers, Nave, Riback, Silver & Wilson
401 Mendocino Avenue, Suite 100
Santa Rosa, CA 95401

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-170

Dear Mr. Rudnansky:

This letter is in regard to your request for advice dated July 16, 2001. Pursuant to our telephone conversation of August 8, 2001, the above referenced advice request has been withdrawn.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, or need future assistance, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace, Senior Counsel
Legal Division
